## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] MCP tools or schemas
- [ ] Project graph or code analysis
- [ ] Cache or generated context behavior
- [ ] CLI or package behavior
- [ ] Documentation only

## Verification

Commands run:

```sh
npm test
npm run test:consumer
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Public docs match current behavior.
- [ ] No credentials, private paths, generated private graphs, or local configs are included.
- [ ] Package metadata and examples still use the published package name.
